title: hebe myrtifolia
intro: Hebe myrtifolia, also known as the New Zealand mountain tea or pink hebe, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand and Australia. The leaves and flowers of Hebe myrtifolia have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The plant has been used to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Hebe myrtifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal benefits.
